prompt: Ultra-realistic consistent identity based on the uploaded selfie in every image — natural facial features preserved, realistic skin texture, expressive glossy eyes, soft cinematic beauty styling, premium lifestyle aesthetic, highly detailed and photorealistic character consistency across all variations. The circle must be large enough to clearly show full upper body + environment context, with balanced margins so the subject is not cropped. Subject must always be centered inside the circle with natural breathing space around. Locations (random cinematic scenes): neon night street, tropical beach sunset, rooftop city view, flower garden, rainy café street, glowing festival amusement park. Poses (candid natural energy): laughing naturally, running playfully, hair blowing in wind, looking back at camera, sitting relaxed, dancing lightly, enjoying music. Outfits (change every scene): electric blue, cherry red, lavender purple, emerald green, pure white, hot pink, matte black. Style: cinematic DSLR photography, ultra-realistic human skin, soft golden glow lighting, dreamy bokeh, shallow depth of field, rich color grading, natural motion blur, premium fashion editorial aesthetic, vibrant colors, luxury lifestyle feel, NOT AI-looking. IMPORTANT: Perfect circular composition, centered framing, subject fully visible inside circle, high-end portrait clarity.
